data.name: FadeForceFeedback
data.value: Fade force feedback when entering or exiting car

data.name: SimulatorNotRunning
data.value: The iRacing simulator is not running

data.name: DownloadQuestion
data.value: Would you like to download it now?

data.name: RunInstallerQuestion
data.value: Would you like to run the installer now?

data.name: ConnectToAdminBoxxOnStartup
data.value: Connect to AdminBoxx on App Startup

data.name: AlwaysEnableFFB
data.value: Enable FFB even if iRacing simulator FFB is on

data.name: DonationsText
data.value: Donations are completely optional. I will never charge any fees for using MAIRA. That said, donations make me feel warm and fuzzy, and is a great motivator for me to keep working on MAIRA. A huge thank you to everybody who have donated already!

data.name: CodeContributionsText
data.value: Are you a C# developer? This project is open to contributions. Learn more by visiting the GitHub repository.

data.name: TranslationContributionsText
data.value: Can you read and write in multiple languages? We need help for languages across the globe. Learn more by visiting our Discord server.

data.name: DiscordModeratorsText
data.value: I want to thank these volunteer moderators for helping answer the many questions posed by MAIRA users, allowing me to have more time to focus on the development of MAIRA!

data.name: AdminBoxxIsUpdating
data.value: The AdminBoxx firmware is being updated

data.name: SendChatMessages
data.value: Send private chat messages to the driver

data.name: InputMappedSettingUpdateEnabled
data.value: Enable input mapped setting update messages

data.name: NotOnCentripetalCircuitTrack
data.value: You are not on the Centripetal Circuit track

data.name: ClassicMAIRAIsRunning
data.value: Classic MAIRA is currently running - please exit classic MAIRA before running this version of MAIRA!

data.name: CalibrationFilesText
data.value: These are the folks who have generously contributed some of their spare time, to run steering effects calibrations on some of their favorite cars, and to upload those calibration files!

data.name: STT_Hint
data.value: Click the enable button. You must check that the browser has the correct audio device selected, by clicking on the microphone icon to the left of the address bar!

data.name: ConnectToWindOnStartup
data.value: Connect to MAIRA Wind on App Startup

data.name: TradingPaintsDisclaimer
data.value: Marvin's Awesome iRacing App (MAIRA) is not affiliated with Trading Paints

data.name: DocumentationText
data.value: This documentation website is a forever work in progress, because new features are being added to this app all the time. I do update the documentation as often as I can, but if the information you are looking for isn't there yet, you can try looking in the Discord server, or in the iRacing forums, for the answers to your questions.

data.name: DiscordText
data.value: The MAIRA Discord server is the fastest way to get answers to your questions, if you can't find it in the documentation. There are volunteers helping out, and I also try to help out as well.

data.name: ForumsText
data.value: This is where it all started. You can look for answers in here, but I am not as active here as I used to be. Visiting the Discord server is the best way to ask questions.
